items.d: a man or woman who writes books
items.s: This famous ___ writes many books for children.
items.hintDe: Diese Person schreibt Bücher.

items.d: very bad and not nice at all
items.s: The weather was ___ all day — it was cold, dark and wet.
items.hintDe: Etwas ist ganz schlimm und überhaupt nicht schön.

items.d: when you do not think about a thing or look after it well
items.s: He was so ___ that he dropped his new tablet.
items.hintDe: Du passt nicht gut auf und denkst nicht nach.

items.d: a big surprise when two of them happen at one time and you did not think it would happen
items.s: We are both wearing a red hat to school today — what a ___!
items.hintDe: Zwei Dinge passieren zur gleichen Zeit, ganz ohne Plan – eine große Überraschung.

items.d: the day, month and year you have your birthday
items.s: Please write down your ___ — the day, month and year of your birthday.
items.hintDe: Tag, Monat und Jahr, an dem du Geburtstag hast.

items.d: the door where you go into a building or a place
items.s: We are going to meet at the big ___ of the museum at three o'clock.
items.hintDe: Hier gehst du in ein Gebäude hinein.

items.d: a small thing a woman carries her keys and money in
items.s: She keeps her keys and money in her ___.
items.hintDe: Darin trägt eine Frau Schlüssel und Geld.

items.d: a way to ask somebody to wait for a short time
items.s: ___ I just need to find my keys before we go.
items.hintDe: Du bittest jemanden, einen kurzen Augenblick zu warten.

items.d: a way to tell somebody to wait for a short time
items.s: ___ I need to put on my shoes before we go.
items.hintDe: Du sagst jemandem, kurz zu warten.

items.d: a way to tell somebody you are sorry, or to ask them to tell you a thing again
items.s: ___ Can you tell me that again, please? I did not understand you.
items.hintDe: Höflich: Du entschuldigst dich oder bittest, etwas zu wiederholen.

items.d: the sound you make when you think a thing is funny
items.s: When a joke is very funny, you give a big ___.
items.hintDe: Der Laut, den du machst, wenn etwas lustig ist.

items.d: when you have a husband or a wife
items.s: My aunt is now ___ to my uncle.
items.hintDe: Du hast einen Mann oder eine Frau geheiratet.

items.d: one of the people in a group
items.s: Every ___ of the group has a job to do.
items.hintDe: Du gehörst zu einer Gruppe oder einem Verein.

items.d: the very cold place high up on the Earth, where there is a lot of snow and ice
items.s: I want to travel to the ___ one day to look at the snow and ice.
items.hintDe: Der ganz kalte Ort im Norden der Erde.

items.d: money like a 50-pound one — it is not metal
items.s: The £50 ___ on the floor was mine.
items.hintDe: Geld aus Papier, kein Münzgeld – zum Beispiel ein 50er.

items.d: one of the people who travel in a train, a ship or a plane
items.s: Every ___ on the ship was happy when it came to land.
items.hintDe: Du fährst oder fliegst mit, zum Beispiel im Schiff oder Flugzeug.

items.d: a number out of one hundred, with the % after it
items.s: About 80 ___ of the children in our year are very good at maths.
items.hintDe: Eine Zahl von hundert, mit dem Zeichen % dahinter.

items.d: a lot of people who wait to go into a place
items.s: There was a very long ___ of people waiting to go into the museum.
items.hintDe: Viele Leute stehen hintereinander und warten.

items.d: when one thing looks very much like the other thing
items.s: My new sweater looks very much like yours, so they are very ___.
items.hintDe: Zwei Dinge schauen fast gleich aus.

items.d: the very cold place at the bottom of the Earth, where penguins live
items.s: Penguins live near the ___ in the cold south of the Earth.
items.hintDe: Der ganz kalte Ort im Süden der Erde.

items.d: a talk that one man or woman gives in front of a lot of people
items.s: My teacher was giving a short ___ to the whole school in the morning.
items.hintDe: Eine Person spricht vor vielen Leuten.

items.d: a high place where a singer is, up in front of a lot of people
items.s: The singer was standing on the ___ while a lot of people watched.
items.hintDe: Der hohe Platz, auf dem ein Sänger vor vielen Leuten steht.

items.d: a man or woman who steals
items.s: The police want to find the ___ who has the woman's handbag now.
items.hintDe: Diese Person stiehlt Sachen.

items.d: to do the thing you really wanted to do
items.s: After a long time, at last she ___ what she wanted.
items.hintDe: Du schaffst am Ende das, was du wolltest.

items.d: you do this to a thing when you give money for it
items.s: I want to ___ a new book with my pocket money.
items.hintDe: Du gibst Geld dafür her und bekommst die Sache.

items.d: to put food or tea into your mouth
items.s: Would you like to ___ a tea or a piece of cake at the café?
items.hintDe: Du nimmst etwas zu dir – ein Getränk oder ein bisschen Essen.

items.d: to give your work to a teacher or to somebody who looks after it
items.s: Please ___ your homework to the teacher before Friday.
items.hintDe: Du gibst deine Arbeit bei der Lehrerin oder dem Lehrer ab.

items.d: to go away and not bother somebody
items.s: Lucas, please ___ your sister! She wants to read her book.

enToDe.text: jemanden in Ruhe und Frieden lassen

items.hintDe: Du gehst weg und störst die Person nicht.

items.d: to enjoy the sound of a singer with your ears, often with headphones on
items.s: He likes to put on his headphones and ___ on the long way to school.
items.hintDe: Du setzt die Kopfhörer auf und hörst Lieder.

items.d: to watch a thing with your eyes so you can enjoy it or study it
items.s: We were ___ at the pictures from our holiday on my tablet.
items.hintDe: Du richtest die Augen darauf und schaust es dir an.

items.d: to feel happy about a good thing that is going to happen
items.s: Lucas was very much ___ to the school holidays in summer.
items.hintDe: Du freust dich auf etwas Schönes, das noch kommt.

items.d: to give money for your food and drinks in a café or restaurant
items.s: After dinner my dad asked the waiter so he could ___ at the restaurant.
items.hintDe: Du zahlst am Ende im Restaurant für das Essen.

items.d: to wait with a lot of people to go into a place
items.s: They were all ___ up at the door to go into the museum.
items.hintDe: Du stellst dich mit anderen hintereinander an.

items.d: to bring a thing back to a place, or to go back to a place
items.s: Please ___ the library book before Friday.
items.hintDe: Du bringst die Sache zurück oder gehst wieder an einen Ort.

items.d: to go down under the sea
items.s: A heavy stone is going to ___ to the bottom of the sea.
items.hintDe: Etwas geht im Wasser nach unten.

items.d: to keep a thing that is not yours, like a thief does
items.s: The thief wanted to ___ the woman's money, but a man was watching him.
items.hintDe: Du nimmst etwas, das dir nicht gehört.

items.d: to stay alive after a very dangerous thing
items.s: The people on the small ship were very happy to ___ the big storm.
items.hintDe: Du bleibst nach einer großen Gefahr am Leben.

items.d: to speak with a friend who is not with you
items.s: Please do not ___ in class.
items.hintDe: Du sprichst am Handy mit jemandem, der nicht bei dir ist.

items.d: to put a pair of these over your eyes to look if they are good on you
items.s: She wanted to ___ to look which ones were best on her.
items.hintDe: Du setzt sie kurz auf, um zu sehen, ob sie dir gut stehen.

items.d: to do a new thing to find out if you like it or how good it is
items.s: Before you go on stage, ___ your jokes with a friend.
items.hintDe: Du machst etwas Neues einmal, um zu sehen, wie es ist.

items.d: to put your arm up high to tell somebody hello or goodbye when they are far away
items.s: At the door of the museum, a girl was ___ at us to come over.
items.hintDe: Du hebst den Arm und grüßt jemanden, der weiter weg ist.

items.d: a way to show a strong feeling about a thing
items.s: ___ beautiful day it is today! Let's go to the park.
items.hintDe: Du zeigst ein starkes Gefühl: „Was für ein …!“
